ame.name: Amethyst
ame.desc: young woman in her early 20s, very long straight purple hair, violet eyes, warm light-brown skin dusted with chalk, practical slate-blue stonemason's dress with leather apron, faint white marble veins tracing her left arm, a small brass chisel-amulet at her throat, kind tired expression
ame.identifier: long purple hair + marble-veined left arm

lina.name: Lina
lina.desc: young woman, wavy honey-blonde hair in a loose braid, freckles, teal shawl over a cream dress, caught mid-run with an arm outstretched

petra.name: Petra the Mason
petra.desc: older sturdy woman in her 60s, short iron-gray hair, weathered face, heavy canvas mason's smock with stone dust, whetstone in hand

marla.name: Marla
marla.desc: plump warm-faced baker in her 40s, brown hair in a flour-dusted kerchief, rolled sleeves, ochre apron over a homespun dress

sena.name: Sena
sena.desc: wiry young woman, short black hair, rope belt with a well-hook, oxblood-red vest, frozen sprinting

odile.name: Odile
odile.desc: slight young bell-ringer, ash-brown hair escaping a novice's coif, gray-and-white habit, hands pressed over her ears

aldith.name: Sister Aldith
aldith.desc: serene middle-aged nun kneeling in prayer, deep indigo habit with white wimple, closed eyes, folded hands

ida.name: Master Ida
ida.desc: tall dignified stonemason master in her 50s, silver-streaked dark hair in a tight bun, fine chisel-scarred hands, deep green work coat, protective stance mid-gesture of shielding someone

sableth.name: Sableth
sableth.desc: weathered quarry forewoman in her 50s, gray-streaked hair in a tight practical braid, rust-red canvas coat, iron whistle on a cord half-raised to her lips, sharp appraising eyes
